response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang), but the role specifically requires a C++ developer with deep STL, multi-threading, message-broker, and industrial-cybersecurity (IEC 62443) expertise. C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments (Dec 2014–Jun 2015) over a decade ago, with no evidence of MQTT, industrial automation protocols, SDL practices, or IoT platform delivery. Skill alignment is too low to justify a senior C++ hire.
strengths: Long tenure as senior/staff engineer with architecture and mentoring experience
Distributed systems exposure (low-latency, micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic)
Strong testing/TDD culture and developer-tooling background
concerns: Minimal and dated C++/STL experience (~6 months in 2014–2015)
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, SDL, MQTT, or industrial automation protocols
Primary stack (TypeScript/Node/DLang) does not match the C++/industrial-platform focus

key_factors.factor: Missing industrial cybersecurity / IEC 62443 / SDL background
Strong general senior engineering and architecture experience
